verdict.summary: gRPC call timed out. Server processing too slow, network latency, or deadline set too short.

dead_ends.action: Remove deadline entirely so calls never time out
dead_ends.why_fails: Without deadlines, stuck calls block forever. Deadlines are a best practice in gRPC.

dead_ends.action: Set very long deadline (5 minutes) for all calls
dead_ends.why_fails: Long deadlines tie up resources. Set per-RPC deadlines appropriate for each operation.

workarounds.action: Set appropriate per-RPC deadline based on expected latency
workarounds.how: metadata = [('grpc-timeout', '30S')]; # or in Python: stub.MyMethod(req, timeout=30)

workarounds.action: Profile server-side handler to find bottleneck
Add server-side deadline propagation and cancellation
workarounds.how: Check context.is_active() periodically in long handlers; abort early if cancelled
